case_title: IANTORNO, SERGIO vs. MOLINA, MIRIAM et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IANTORNO, SERGIO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-12-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-19-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE T. MASON, RPTR. M. NORMAN, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. MERCEDES GAVIN DEFT. IN PRO PER SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFT. ARLENE MONROY-SWORN 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. ALL PRESENT. STIP. SETTLMNT. REACHED. DEFT. TO VACATE PREMISES 167 ALBION ST, FIRST ROOM ON LEFT BY 1/28/95 AT 10AM. DEFT. TO RETURN KEY TO CARLOS. DEFT. IS SOLE OCCUPANT. EACH SIDE WAIVE ANY OTHER CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER. DEFT. WAIVES STAY OF EVICTION. PLTF. TO DISMISS IF DEFT. NOT IN DEFAULT OF ANY PROVISION; OTHERWISE, PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGEMENT: POSSESSION OF PREMISES. $975.00 RENT AND DAMAGES. DEFT. WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. LEASE IS FORFEITED.
